faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in East Elmhurst?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in East Elmhurst typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing for all our East Elmhurst customers.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in East Elmhurst homes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows and doors, mud tubes on foundation walls, and small piles of wood-colored droppings. East Elmhurst's older homes are particularly susceptible, so annual inspections are recommended to catch infestations early before extensive damage occurs.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in East Elmhurst?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in East Elmhurst are completed in one day, though larger properties or severe infestations may require follow-up visits. Liquid barrier treatments and bait systems typically show results within 30-90 days, and we include monitoring visits to ensure complete elimination of the colony.

faqs.question: Are termite treatments safe for East Elmhurst families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved termiticides that are safe when applied by our licensed professionals. Most treatments require only a brief 2-4 hour absence from your East Elmhurst home, and we provide specific safety instructions based on the treatment method used to protect your family and pets.
